title: OPItems
description: Adds many new items to the game - from OPItems to utilities
body:
### Add OPItems to your Game! OPItems introduces a powerful collection of custom items ranging from utilities to OPItems. Whether you’re building PvP arenas, adventure maps, or just adding usefull tools to survival - OPItems gives you the creative freedom to do more with Minecraft. It also includes utility commands and functions to reduce common sources of lag and commands to integrate it with command block systems or other plugins. _Use with moderation. Or don’t. Up to you._


You found a bug or have **_any idea_** what should be in the Plugin? [Join my discord server!](https://discord.com/invite/WzkuP3kPaJ) I am always searching for new inspiration, so dont hesitate if you have _any_ wish for an item.

Use /opitems recipes for recipies and a list of items


Bukkit/Spigot and Minecraft versions under 1.20.6 are not supported.
Please always use the most recent version of this plugin.

Added Items **Utility** Super Sponge – Clears large water areas
Lava Sponge – Clears lava in a medium radius
Night Visor – Grants permanent night vision when equipped
Water Helmet – Allows infinite underwater breathing
Skull Imitator – A fake skull with your appearance
Speed Leggings – Grants extra speed
Eternal Steak - An eternal steak
Crafter – Opens a crafting table
Portable Work Station - A workstation for everywhere
Infinite Milk Bucket - When in need of milk
Infinite Rocket - A Rocket built for flying even further

**Protection & Anti-Grief Tools** Anti Explosion Helmet – Greatly reduces explosion damage
Anti Fall – Prevents fall and collision damage while in inventory
Protective Elytra – Elytra with extra protection
Defuser – Safely disarms landmines

**Explosives & Chaos Tools** TNT-Detonator – Detonate selected TNT blocks remotely
TNT Bow – Spawns multiple primed TNTs on impact
Wand of Boom – Triggers small explosions
Wand of Massive Boom – Triggers larger explosions
Boomer – Shoots TNT
Landmine – Explodes on contact
Blitzer – Strikes lightning on targeted block

**Combat & PvP Gear** Cursed Sword – Instantly kills enemies (not players), teleports user (might come with unforseen effects)
Endsword – Teleports you 8 blocks in your current direction
Wand of Blocks – High damage, but with risk of backfire
The Blocky Sword – Deals great base damage
Knocky the Stick – Knockback X
Blazer – Shoots fireballs
Bower – Fires arrows without consuming any
The Anti Damage – Protection 75 armor
Wand of Warden – Summons a Warden (at the cost of some health)
Wand of Invisibility – Grants invisibility
Piercer – A bow that shoots throught entities

**Mobility & Travel** Fly Feather – Grants creative-style flight
Laucher – Launches you upward
Hook of Velocity – Enables fast directional movement
Enderpearler – Throws an Ender Pearl in view direction
Wand of Home – Teleport to your saved location
Endsword – Short-range directional teleport
Portal2Go – Access the Nether from anywhere
Private Pocket Dimension Wand – Teleports you to your own private dimension

**Miscellaneous** Pig Cannon – Fires pigs
Pig Spawn Egg – Used for crafting only
Fire Shoes – Cosmetic fire trail
Strange Bottle - A strange Bottle with strange liquid with strange effects
Commands **Commands:**
/opitems
/items

**Debug Commands:**
/opitems
Additional Features Automated Item Removal Tool
Autoupdater
Player Skull Generator
Additional Information From version 1.9.13 onwards, this plugin collects only the following data to help improve future development:
Example: v1;r1;;1.21.7-26-533d93c (MC: 1.21.7);1.9.13
Collected fields: Collection Version; Reason Number (e.g. 1 = Startup); Minecraft Version; OPItems Version
Only ~10% of the incoming data is collected.

bStats is also included
